replies_today.reply: Yamal was 16 during the 2024 Euros, not 18. Media hostility for Palestine solidarity began May 2026, not linked to the Euros. Precise information combats narrative manipulation.
Orbán's 2025 law banned public assemblies promoting homosexuality. Mayor Karácsony authorizing these flags shows a clear shift. Suppressing dissent through state norms is power manipulation.
